notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Yordan Alvarez reaches on a fielding error by center fielder Mike Trout. Yordan Alvarez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Trey Mancini GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trey Mancini grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Nick Madrigal out at 2nd. Trey Mancini out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza pops out to second baseman Jose Altuve.

notableEvents.label: Yordan Alvarez reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Yordan Alvarez reaches on a fielding error by center fielder Mike Trout. Yordan Alvarez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jake Meyers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Meyers flies out to left fielder Wade Meckler.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Angels challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Jeremy Peña steals (5) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Jake Meyers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Meyers pops out to second baseman Nick Madrigal. Jose Altuve scores.
